title: Workflow Manifest
description: Manifest emitted by the compiler beside the DSL file. Signable: signature is Ed25519 over the canonical JSON (RFC 8785 style: sorted keys, no whitespace) of the manifest with the signature block removed.

step_summary.description: Numbered plain-English steps from the renderer, embedded so any surface (gallery, explain, registry) shows them without executing code.

inputs_schema.description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) object describing the typed inputs inferred by compiler pass 2.

apps.description: Executable paths or package ids this workflow may drive.

paths.description: Directory subtrees this workflow may touch.

step_ref.description: Step id the gate binds to; null for workflow-level pre/post.

expr.description: Gate expression AST. Safety gates are runtime-owned and never appear here.

path.description: Relative path to the TypeScript DSL file.

hash.description: BLAKE3 hex of the DSL file bytes.

signature.description: Absent or null for unsigned workflows (which run dry-run only when installed from outside).

pubkey_fingerprint.description: Hex BLAKE3-16 of the raw Ed25519 public key.

sig.description: Base64 Ed25519 signature over canonical JSON minus this block.
